strengths: Genuine engineering breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and systems over ~17 years, demonstrating real adaptability across stacks
Founder-level entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform in active use by NGOs — satisfies the startup/intrapreneurial signal at a surface level
Recent hands-on contribution to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq shows early, practical engagement with agentic workflows
concerns: AI involvement is shallow and confined to ~15 months at re:cinq; there are no shipped AI products at scale, no published work, and no evidence of recognized standing in the AI field that this director-level role explicitly requires
The entire career arc sits at Senior/Staff individual-contributor level with no signal of director-scope influence, strategic customer advisory, or organizational AI/cloud strategy ownership

No advanced degree in an AI-related discipline and no deep cloud architecture credentials — both strongly preferred — while the resume's cloud exposure is limited to a single AWS CDK reference at Optilyz

key_factors.factor: Absence of advanced degree and cloud platform depth

response.justification: The role targets a director-level principal with demonstrated AI platform expertise, cloud strategy credentials, and a track record of advising strategic customers — none of which this resume establishes. AI involvement amounts to roughly 15 months of developer-tooling work at a single employer, with no shipped AI products at meaningful scale, no research output, and no public recognition in the field. The career trajectory has remained firmly at Senior/Staff hands-on engineering roles across small-to-mid-sized companies, with no evidence of cross-organizational strategic influence or the advisory scope the position demands. The absence of a graduate degree in an AI-related field further widens the gap against the preferred qualifications. The candidate profile describes a skilled and versatile senior engineer, not a director-level AI strategy principal.
